name: arXiv Search
tagline: Watches arXiv for papers you care about and sends matching results into BFrost.
description:
A producer worker that runs a saved arXiv query and publishes new matching papers as `research.paper` items on the BFrost Item Bus.

It uses the public arXiv API, needs no credentials, deduplicates already-seen papers, and ships a simple dashboard with run status and recent papers. Pair it with Markdown Notes Publisher for a clean low-code research workflow.
author: @ccascio

versions.changelog: Initial source-backed release with arXiv query settings, research.paper publishing, deduplication, dashboard view, and low-code README.
